title: Game Play Analysis III
description: For each player and each date, find the running total of games played.
constraints: Running total resets per player (PARTITION BY player_id)
key_concept: SUM() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY event_date) — cumulative sum window function.

hints.L1: You need a running total per player ordered by date. Use a window function.
hints.L2: SUM(games_played) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY event_date). Default frame includes all preceding rows.
hints.L3: SELECT player_id, event_date, SUM(games_played) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY event_date) AS games_played_so_far FROM Activity
